{{Quote|I figure if my buddy Mot doesn't go talk to this O'choa girl, I should go give it a shot. I mean look at her, she's beautiful!|Bun'Del|<ref name="SWG:TPS" />}}
'''Mot Draken''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], he visited [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]], a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] located near the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]]. While there, he fell deeply in love with [[O'choa Detera]], a dancer performing in the station's cantina and decided to remain on the station. Two years later,<ref name="SWG:TPS" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> he was still living on the station but never had the courage to talk to Detera and share his feelings. A baffling attempt at impressing the dancer was stuffing his mouth with [[Flurr-Cle Onion|Flurr-Cle onions]]. Then, O'choa Detera finally understood why Draken was spending so much time in the cantina but she instead had a crush on [[Bun'Del]], one of Mot's friends.<ref name="SWG:TPS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Mot Draken appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:TPS" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Mot Draken was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]],"<ref name="SWG:TPS" /> introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
